_comment: pavl21 / Icarus Dedicated — source of truth lives at github.com/pavl21/icarus-dedicated
name: Icarus Dedicated
author: pavl21@users.noreply.github.com
description: Dedicated server for Icarus (Steam AppID 2089300). Runs the Windows binary under Wine via the pavl21/icarus-dedicated yolks-style image, which already bundles WineHQ + SteamCMD + a pre-seeded wineprefix (vcrun2022, corefonts). Game files and updates are pulled from Steam, so installs are fast and the image is not tied to a game version. Maintained by pavl21.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# pavl21 / Icarus install script
# Runs inside the same image as the runtime container so SteamCMD and Wine
# are already present. /mnt/server is the Pterodactyl install-time mount of
# the future /home/container volume.
set -e
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "[pavl21-install] SteamCMD download — AppID ${SRCDS_APPID:-2089300}"
/home/container/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh \
    +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
    +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
    +login anonymous \
    +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID:-2089300} validate \
    +quit

echo "[pavl21-install] done"

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Name shown in the Steam server browser.

variables.name: Server Port (Game)
variables.description: UDP port used by the game itself. Default: 17777.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used by the Steam server query protocol. Default: 27015.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run SteamCMD update on every server start. 1 = enabled, 0 = disabled.

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Icarus Dedicated Server AppID on Steam. Do not change unless Valve ships a new branch.
